description: CompositionBlack high ankle men's lace-up shoes with canvas upper, rubber outsole, red laces and stitch detailing, and an All Star heel patchThese uber cool shoes from converse come in a stylish high ankle design with black canvas uppers and an All Star heel patch for durability. The white canvas lining and a cushioned footbed ensures hours of uninterrupted comfort, while the red lace-up front with metallic eyelets provides a snug Fit. The original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection, while the multi-directional outsole enhnaces grip making it a perfect urban footwear.       shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
